==About==
===Broadcast Talent===
{{BroadcasterCard
|b1=AnkiiiBOT
|b2=Spero
|b3=RA1
}}

===Format===
* '''iQOO Pro Series 2024''' : ''January 29th - Febraury 1st
** 24 teams.
** Squad , {{Abbr/TPP}}.
* '''Group Stage''' : ''January 29th - 30th
** 24 teams.
*** 4 teams from [[IQOO All Stars Cup/Season 4|All Stars Cup]], 20 invited teams.
** Teams are divided equally into 3 groups of 8 teams each.
*** Round-robin format.
** 2 matchdays.
** {{bgcolortext|up|Top 16 teams}} qualify for the '''[[#Grand Finals|Grand Finals]]'''.
* '''Grand Finals''' : ''January 31st - Febraury 1st
** 16 teams.
** 2 matchdays.
{{PUBGM 2023 Points System|showtb=true}}

===Allocations===
* {{Bgcolortext|byeup|'''Top 14 teams'''}} qualify for {{LeagueIconSmall/iqoo india league|}} '''[[IQOO India League/2024|iQOO India League]]'''.
